rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Indonesia overall. Avoid non-essential travel to the provinces of Papua and West Papua due to civil unrest and an ongoing armed separatist movement. Avoid non-essential travel to parts of Maluku province and Central Sulawesi (Poso region) due to ongoing security risks.

rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Thailand overall. Avoid non-essential travel to the provinces of Yala, Pattani, Narathiwat and Songkhla due to ongoing insurgency and risk of terrorist attacks. Avoid all travel to the border area with Cambodia within 20 km of the border due to armed conflict and landmines.

rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Türkiye overall due to the threat of terrorist attacks and demonstrations. Avoid non-essential travel to the southeastern provinces due to ongoing insurgency and risk of terrorist attacks. Avoid all travel to within 10 km of the borders with Iraq and Syria due to unpredictable security situation and terrorism.

rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Egypt overall due to ongoing tensions, the unpredictable security situation and the threat of terrorism. Avoid all travel to northern Sinai due to terrorist activity and ongoing military operations. Avoid all travel to the Western desert and Libyan border area due to smuggling, terrorist activities, the presence of armed groups and ongoing military operations.
